zh.lifeSummary: 當John St. Maur, Esq.於1408年5月26日出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特貝金頓 煙雨 斯坦德維其可時，他的父親John de St. Maur31歲，母親Margaret de Erleigh21歲。他和Elizabeth Brooke至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1438年9月25日在他的家鄉享年30歲。

nameMeanings.name: St.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: 1  French: habitational name from any of the places so called, for example in Normandy, named from a religious dedication to a (male) St. Clair.
2  North American variant spelling of   St  .   Claire  .

variants.name: Claire
meanings: Variant of   Clair  , an altered form of German   Klare  .

variants.name: St
meanings: Americanized spelling of French   St  .   Denis  .

nameMeanings.name: Maur,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: nickname for someone supposedly resembling a mouse, in appearance or timidity, from Middle High German mūs ‘mouse’.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): from German Maus ‘mouse’, one of the most common of the unflattering surnames imposed on Jews by non-Jewish government officials in 18th- and 19th-century central Europe.

variants.name: Muus
meanings: German (Hamburg): nickname for someone supposedly resembling a mouse, in appearance or timidity, from Middle High German mūs ‘mouse’. Compare Maus and Muhs .

variants.name: Muske
meanings: North German (also Müske): nickname from a diminutive of Middle Low German mūs ‘mouse’ (see Maus 1).

variants.name: Meisel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Russian Anatoliy, Boris, Leonid, Yefim.

variants.name: Mousel
meanings: Americanized form of German Mäusl, from a diminutive of Maus .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When John St. Maur, Esq. was born on 26 May 1408, in Beckington with Standerwick, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, John de St. Maur, was 31 and his mother, Margaret de Erleigh, was 21. He had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Elizabeth Brooke. He died on 25 September 1438, in his hometown, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John St. Maur, Esq. est né le 26 mai 1408, à Beckington with Standerwick, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de St. Maur, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margaret d’Erleigh, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Elizabeth Brooke. Il est décédé le 25 septembre 1438, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 30 ans.

Mai 1408 in Beckington with Standerwick, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de St. Maur 31 und seine Mutter Margaret de Erleigh 21. ko.lifeSummary: John St. Maur, Esq.(이)가 1408년 5월 26일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 베킨그턴 위스 스탠더윅에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de St. Maur(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Erleigh(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Brooke(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1438년 9월 25일 그의 고향에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John St. Maur, Esq. родился 26 мая 1408 г. в местности беккингтон вит стандирвикк, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John de St. Maur было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Erleigh, 21. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Elizabeth Brooke. Он умер 25 сентября 1438 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 30 лет.
